title: AMERICAN STROKE ASSOCIATION - 211info
text: AMERICAN HEART/AMERICAN STROKE ASSOCIATION AMERICAN STROKE ASSOCIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Strives to reduce death and disability from stroke through education and public awareness efforts. Website offers information on warning signs, treatment, and recovery from stroke. Also offers listings of local stroke support groups, an online stroke support network for those affected by stroke to share their experiences, and the Stroke Connection E-newsletter. 7272 Greenville Avenue Dallas, TX 75231 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-5pm, Saturday 7am-3pm (888) 478-7653 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 478-7653 Administration (913) 649-1776 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Chinese, Spanish, Vietnamese, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Charities/Grantmaking Organizations * Stroke Disease/Disability Information * Stroke Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Stroke Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AMERICAN HEART ASSOCIATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CPR AND FIRST AID COURSE FINDER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AMERICAN HEART/AMERICAN STROKE ASSOCIATION
